title: python3 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[3.6.8-72.0.1]
- Add Oracle Linux distribution in platform.py [Orabug: 20812544]

[3.6.8.openela.0]
- Add openela to supported dists

[3.6.8-72]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-12084
Resolves: RHEL-135911
